title: Budget 1× RTX 3090 — Local LLM Starter
subtitle: 24GB VRAM · the cheapest sane way into local LLMs · runs 27-35B models well, 70B quantized · prices a 2026-06-26 snapshot — edit / autofill to refresh

rows.name: GPU
rows.spec: RTX 3090 24GB (used). The value king for local AI. June-2026 market avg ~$1,050.

rows.name: Motherboard
rows.spec: B650 AM5 (PCIe 5.0 x16 slot; pick one with good VRM).

rows.name: RAM
rows.spec: 64GB DDR5-6000 (2×32GB) — headroom for CPU offload of big-MoE experts.

rows.name: PSU
rows.spec: 850W 80+ Gold (3090 spikes hard; don't go below 850W).

rows.name: Case
rows.spec: Mid-tower with clearance for a 3-slot 3090 + good airflow.
